name: Bullion Trading LLC
description_short: New York-based precious metals dealer specializing in buying, selling, and trading gold, silver, platinum, and palladium bullion coins and bars since 2008.
description_long:
Bullion Trading LLC is a New York-based precious metals dealer that has been operating since 2008, positioning itself as a long-standing destination for bullion transactions. The company serves customers nationwide through its online platform at bulliontradingllc.com, offering both retail purchase and direct selling opportunities for those looking to liquidate precious metals holdings.

The company specializes in buying and selling four primary precious metals: gold, silver, platinum, and palladium in multiple formats including coins, bars, rounds, and casting grain. Their product catalog includes offerings from 10+ trusted mints and refineries, with specific product lines such as American Gold Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Austrian Philharmonics, South African Krugerrands, Chinese Gold Pandas, and Australian Lunar Series coins. They maintain an online inventory system with real-time pricing information and product comparison tools.

Bullion Trading LLC emphasizes quality assurance and authenticity verification as core differentiators, claiming to uphold rigorous standards for purity and authenticity across all products. The company highlights its commitment to accurate and transparent information, competitive pricing, and seamless buying experiences. According to their website, they report having sold 1 million products, registered 20,000 users, and expanded services across all U.S. states.

As a precious metals dealer rather than a traditional financial services provider, Bullion Trading LLC serves investment and collection purposes rather than credit, lending, or financial emergency needs. The business model is transactional—buy, sell, and trade bullion—with pricing that fluctuates with commodity markets. Like all bullion dealers, the company is subject to market volatility, and customers bear the risk of price movements between purchase and sale.
pros: Established 15+ year operating history since 2008 provides track record and stability
Nationwide online accessibility across all U.S. states eliminates geographic limitations
Multiple precious metal options (gold, silver, platinum, palladium) in varied formats (coins, bars, rounds, casting grain)
Products sourced from 10+ recognized mints and refineries including American, Austrian, Canadian, and Australian official sources
Real-time pricing information and AI-powered bullion assistant for customer research and comparison
Both buying and selling services enable two-way transactions for customers wanting to liquidate or acquire
Phone (212-869-7650) and email support channels plus online account management system
cons: Precious metals dealer, not a liquidity source—no short-term cash advance capability unlike traditional pawn shops
Pricing subject to volatile commodity markets; customers bear full price risk between purchase and sale transactions
Limited public information on buyback premiums, spreads, or fee structures on the website
No physical location details provided for local walk-in service despite 'Location' menu reference
AI Assistant explicitly disclaims accuracy and warns against submission of personal/sensitive information
best_for: Precious metals investors seeking to buy or sell bullion coins and bars at market rates
Collectors looking to acquire certified coins from established mints with authentication assurance
Individuals with existing precious metals holdings wanting to liquidate or trade for different metals
diagnosis: Bullion Trading LLC is best for investors and collectors actively buying or selling precious metals at market rates, not for consumers seeking emergency cash, credit solutions, or collateral-based lending. The primary caveat is that this is a commodity trader, not a financial services provider—prices fluctuate with global markets, and profitability depends entirely on timing and market conditions rather than borrowing or lending terms.
services: Buy gold bullion coins (American Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Austrian Philharmonics, Krugerrands, Chinese Pandas, Australian Lunar Series)
Buy gold bars and rounds in various weights and grades
Buy silver bullion coins and silver bars
Sell precious metals directly to the company (buyback service)
Trade between different precious metals and formats
Purchase casting grain for refining or manufacturing
Product comparison tool for analyzing multiple bullion options
AI Bullion Assistant for product recommendations and pricing guidance
Online account creation and portfolio management
Real-time pricing charts and market data for 1oz gold coins
